Patient.title: Patient
Patient.description: General Patient Profile details maintained by the clinical psychologist

phone.description: Contact phone for WhatsApp reminder simulation

ownerId.description: User UID of the psychologist who owns this record

Appointment.title: Appointment
Appointment.description: Visual agenda meetings and reservations requested by public clients or therapists

patientRut.description: Chilean RUT of the booking patient

consentLawAccepted.description: Status of the consent of standard Chilean Laws

videoRoomId.description: Unique room key for the encrypted videocall

ownerId.description: Therapist user ID owning the agenda

evolutionState.description: Whether the evolution clinical notes has been signed/completed or temporarily saved as draft

History.title: ClinicalHistory
History.description: Confidential clinical evolution records containing therapy progress notes

notes.description: Subjective progress notes written by doctor

aiSummary.description: AI summarized medical outcome of the session

testFormResults.description: Standardized test results completed during session

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.description: Psychologist details, pricing configurations, and automatic reminder switches

id.description: The UID of the owning psychologist

sessionPrice.description: Invoicing fee for a standard hour

Review.title: Review
Review.description: Patient satisfaction evaluations and public reviews with proper consent under Chilean laws

patientName.description: Display name of patient, or anonymized if requested

consentLawAccepted.description: Consent for Chilean Law 19.628 & 20.584 on data protection

publicConsent.description: Consent for displaying publicly to transparent and improve service

isAnonymized.description: If true, patient wishes to remain anonymous or use initials

ownerId.description: Therapist UID whom this review is for

tags.description: Tag list representing chosen feedback themes or categories

MoodJournal.title: MoodJournal
MoodJournal.description: Confidential cognitive-behavioral therapy (CBT) mood and sleep daily trackers recorded by patients

id.description: Unique identifier of the mood log

patientRut.description: Locked patient RUT identification for privacy-by-design lookup

patientEmail.description: Email identifier of the tracking patient

sleepScore.description: Sleep quality rating from 1 to 5 stars

cognitiveNote.description: Reflexive thoughts or sleep diary remarks

ownerId.description: The psychologist therapist owner ID for therapeutic oversight

ClinicalAudit.title: ClinicalAudit
ClinicalAudit.description: Access tracking records for patient profiles and actions done within clinical scopes

AuditLog.title: AuditLog
AuditLog.description: Electronic signature tracking records for clinical evolution notes

PublicBookedSlot.title: PublicBookedSlot
PublicBookedSlot.description: Anonymized booked slots mapped per date for public reservation calendar constraints without leaking PII

id.description: Equal to the matching appointment ID

ownerId.description: User UID of the psychologist who owns the parent agenda

/reviews/{reviewId}.description: Patient satisfaction evaluations and feedback reviews

/mood_journals/{journalId}.description: CBT mood and sleep daily tracks recorded securely by patients

/clinical_audits/{auditId}.description: Electronic audit logs for patient privacy compliance under Chilean laws

/audit_logs/{logId}.description: Electronic audit/signature registers designed to prevent alteration

/public_booked_slots/{slotId}.description: Anonymized booked slots mapped per date for public calendar constraints to prevent double-booking safely without leaking patient PII
